channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 30 Or 16? Nigerian Politician Mahmud Sadis Buba Caught In Age Scandal

media:content.media:description: The document leak sparked widespread outrage.

item.description: Buba addressed his small body size by explaining that he has dwarfism, a condition he says he inherited from his paternal grandfather.
item.content:encoded: Buba addressed his small body size by explaining that he has dwarfism, a condition he says he inherited from his paternal grandfather.

item.title: Indian-Origin Pilot Dies In US Chopper Crash. He Got Married Just Hours Ago

media:content.media:description: Dave Fiji's new bride, Jessni, survived the crash

item.description: According to his father, Dave Fiji, a first officer for Delta Air Lines, had concerns about the weather before the takeoff.
item.content:encoded: According to his father, Dave Fiji, a first officer for Delta Air Lines, had concerns about the weather before the takeoff.

item.title: US-Iran war live updates: US Launches 'Self-Defence' Strikes On Iranian Drone Sites
item.description: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal
item.content:encoded: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal

item.title: US Strikes Iran's Radar, Drone Control Sites In Goruk And Qeshm Islands

media:content.media:description: Centcom said that no US military personnel were harmed.

item.description: US says it struck Iranian radar and drone control sites over the weekend
item.content:encoded: US says it struck Iranian radar and drone control sites over the weekend

item.title: Malaysia Enforces Social Media Ban For Under-16, Platforms Must Verify Age

media:content.media:description: Parents whose children manage to bypass the law will not be penalized

item.description: The rules require social media platforms to implement age-verification systems and block users under 16 from creating accounts. They apply to platforms with at least 8 million users, including Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and YouTube.
item.content:encoded: The rules require social media platforms to implement age-verification systems and block users under 16 from creating accounts. They apply to platforms with at least 8 million users, including Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and YouTube.

item.title: Did Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian Resign Over Disagreement With IRGC? A Fact Check

media:content.media:description: Tasnim News Agency reported that the President has not resigned

item.description: This added to months of reports claiming tensions between the government and the Islamic Republic's military-security institutions.
item.content:encoded: This added to months of reports claiming tensions between the government and the Islamic Republic's military-security institutions.

item.title: What To Know As Israel's Lebanon Incursion In 25 Years Complicates Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: On March 2, Hezbollah again fired at Israel, prompting Israel to invade southern Lebanon

item.description: Israel has warned Lebanese civilians across the south to evacuate or risk being in the line of fire. Lebanese PM on Saturday accused Israel of "implementing a policy of total destruction of cities and towns."
item.content:encoded: Israel has warned Lebanese civilians across the south to evacuate or risk being in the line of fire. Lebanese PM on Saturday accused Israel of "implementing a policy of total destruction of cities and towns."

item.title: 'Uphold Iran's Rights': Top Iranian Negotiator's Condition To Sign US Deal

media:content.media:description: Ghalibaf's remarks came as Iran and Washington continue to exchange to strike a peace deal.

item.description: Iran views sanction relief and the release of its assets frozen in banks abroad as among its key rights to be ensured under any deal with the US.
item.content:encoded: Iran views sanction relief and the release of its assets frozen in banks abroad as among its key rights to be ensured under any deal with the US.

item.title: Arty Banana, Eaten Earlier By Hungry Tourist, Stolen From France Museum

media:content.media:description: It is not the first time damage has been dealt to the conceptual artwork.

item.description: The missing fruit -- which was taped to a wall to form the provocative work by Cattelan called "Comedian" -- was noticed by a guard on Saturday to have gone missing.
item.content:encoded: The missing fruit -- which was taped to a wall to form the provocative work by Cattelan called "Comedian" -- was noticed by a guard on Saturday to have gone missing.

item.title: US-Iran Nuclear Deal Could Unlock $300 Billion For Tehran: Report

media:content.media:description: The fund would be discussed during an initial 60-day negotiation period.

item.description: On the nuclear issue, Iran would agree not to develop nuclear weapons, while both sides would later decide the fate of Iran’s uranium stockpile and enrichment activities in a final deal
item.content:encoded: On the nuclear issue, Iran would agree not to develop nuclear weapons, while both sides would later decide the fate of Iran’s uranium stockpile and enrichment activities in a final deal

item.title: Google's 32 Million-Strong Mosquito Army To Fight...Mosquitoes

media:content.media:description: Releasing males does not add to the biting population.

item.description: The technique of sterilising pest insects to control their numbers is not a new one and has been discussed as a chemical-free alternative for decades.
item.content:encoded: The technique of sterilising pest insects to control their numbers is not a new one and has been discussed as a chemical-free alternative for decades.

item.title: Video: Huge Explosion Rocks Myanmar Building, Children Among 45 Dead

media:content.media:description: Local authorities are currently providing relief, medical care and resettlement assistance.

item.description: About 70 other people were injured in the explosion that took place around noon in the village of Kaungtup, in Namhkam township.
item.content:encoded: About 70 other people were injured in the explosion that took place around noon in the village of Kaungtup, in Namhkam township.

item.title: Medieval Castle Captured In Israel's Deepest Push Into Lebanon In Decades

media:content.media:description: The castle's capture marks a major development in the latest Israel-Hezbollah war.

item.description: The capture of Beaufort castle came after days of airstrikes and intense fighting in nearby villages where Israeli troops fought Hezbollah members.
item.content:encoded: The capture of Beaufort castle came after days of airstrikes and intense fighting in nearby villages where Israeli troops fought Hezbollah members.

item.title: The Night Paris Plunged Into Chaos: Riots, Death, Mayhem Grip City Streets

media:content.media:description: A man waves a Paris Saint-Germain flag as a barricade burns in the 16th arrondissement of Paris.

item.description: Paris Saint-Germain retained the Champions League title on Saturday, beating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties in Budapest, but the joy of victory gave way to destruction on the streets of France's capital.
item.content:encoded: Paris Saint-Germain retained the Champions League title on Saturday, beating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties in Budapest, but the joy of victory gave way to destruction on the streets of France's capital.

item.title: 'Destroy More, Get More': Ukraine Turns Drone Warfare Into Video Game
item.description: Through its Army of Drones Bonus program, frontline units earn points for verified battlefield achievements
item.content:encoded: Through its Army of Drones Bonus program, frontline units earn points for verified battlefield achievements

item.title: Video: Russian Forces Use Handheld "Yolka" System To Take Down Drone

media:content.media:description: The "Yolka" is designed to shoot down enemy drones midair using impact.

item.description: The system first came into public attention during Russia’s Victory Day parade in May 2025, when a compact device was seen with a security officer near President Vladimir Putin.
item.content:encoded: The system first came into public attention during Russia’s Victory Day parade in May 2025, when a compact device was seen with a security officer near President Vladimir Putin.

item.title: AI Solves 80-Year-Old Math Problem That Stumped Experts For Decades

media:content.media:description: OpenAI researchers gave the problem to an advanced AI model.

item.description: OpenAI's AI model solved the famous unit distance problem, a question that had challenged mathematicians since 1946
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's AI model solved the famous unit distance problem, a question that had challenged mathematicians since 1946

item.title: Narrower Than A Fridge, Deadlier Than Thai Caves: Inside Laos Cave Rescue

media:content.media:description: Amid rains, escape routes vanished and the cave became a doomed trap

item.description: The questions outnumbered solutions. Were the miners safe, or even alive? Could they be reached? How would they use regulators, gauges and oxygen tanks, diving equipment they probably would have never seen, let alone used?
item.content:encoded: The questions outnumbered solutions. Were the miners safe, or even alive? Could they be reached? How would they use regulators, gauges and oxygen tanks, diving equipment they probably would have never seen, let alone used?

item.title: What Trump's Latest Health Checkup Says And What He Needs To Work On

media:content.media:description: Doctors conducted a detailed physical and mental health examination.

item.description: The report showed that his health appears better than what is typically expected for someone his age.
item.content:encoded: The report showed that his health appears better than what is typically expected for someone his age.

item.title: Chinese Missile Likely Downed US F-15 Fighter Jet In Iran: Report
item.description: US officials said the equipment could have improved Iran’s ability to track advanced fighter jets like the US F-15E Strike Eagle.
item.content:encoded: US officials said the equipment could have improved Iran’s ability to track advanced fighter jets like the US F-15E Strike Eagle.
